description: Part 3/10: Add utility/helper functions - pattern string generation, timeframe helpers, array management, and visual object creation/deletion helpers for MT5 (ObjectCreate wrappers for rectangles, lines, labels).
steps: Add FormatTFLabel() function - converts minutes to label like '5m' or '1H'
Add IsEntry()/IsScalp()/IsIntra() helper functions based on minute ranges
Add PatternStr() function - builds pattern string from booleans (third, first, laol, sn, sn_dbl, fu, tbe, hcs, hcs_forming) exactly as f_pattern_str in Pine
Add IsFuPattern() and IsEmPattern() functions matching f_is_fu_pattern and f_is_em_pattern
Add HasBothWicks(), IsInsideBar(), BullishIBConfirmation(), BearishIBConfirmation() functions
Add CreateUniqueObjName() function that generates unique object names using a counter

Add CreateRectangle() wrapper function - calls ObjectCreate with OBJ_RECTANGLE, sets border color, fill color, back flag, border style (STYLE_DASH or STYLE_SOLID), border width. Parameters: name, time1, price1, time2, price2, clr_border, clr_fill, border_style, border_width, text
Add UpdateRectangle() function - modifies existing rectangle properties (color, border style, coordinates)
Add CreateTrendLine() wrapper - for LAOL lines and pip lines. OBJ_TREND with style (dashed/dotted/solid), color, width
Add CreateLabel() wrapper - OBJ_TEXT or OBJ_LABEL for text labels on chart with position, color, font size
Add PushUnique() function for string arrays (equivalent of f_push_unique)
Add TimeAgo() function matching f_time_ago - converts elapsed time to readable string
Add GetTFBoxes() function that returns pointer/reference to the correct TF box array by index (0-24)
Add ArrayRemoveAt() template functions for each struct array type (TrackedBox, LaolLineData, HcsBoxData, RrBoxSet) since MQL5 doesn't have generic array.remove
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 3/10 - Helper functions and MT5 object wrappers'
acceptance_criteria: All helper functions have correct MQL5 signatures and implementations
MT5 object creation functions properly set all visual properties (colors with alpha, border styles)
Object names are unique to prevent conflicts
Functions match the logic of their Pine Script equivalents exactly
verification: Read the file and verify each helper function is implemented
Verify ObjectCreate calls use correct OBJ_* constants and property setters
findings: Implemented 20+ helper functions including: GenerateObjName, FormatTFLabel, IsEntry, GetFullCategory, PatternStr, IsFuPattern, IsEmPattern, HasBothWicks, IsInsideBar, BullishIBConfirmation, BearishIBConfirmation, CreateRectangleObj, UpdateRectCoords, SetRectBorderStyle, CreateTrendLineObj, CreateTextObj, DeleteObj, TimeAgoStr, PushUniqueStr, CheckBreak, ResolveLastValid, FindNextExtremeCandle, GetTFBoxesCount, SetTFBoxesCount, GetTFBox, SetTFBox, AddTFBox, RemoveTFBox, RemoveLaolLine, RemoveHcsBox, RemoveRrBox, DeleteAllObjects. File now 1164 lines with balanced braces. Used switch-case pattern for TF box access since MQL5 cannot return array references.
